prompt: A deliberately clumsy, childlike digital doodle of a happy cat named Shiro, drawn in a chaotic scribbly meme style on a plain white background. The cat is centered and shown in a playful mid-leap stretch, facing right, with a simple rounded white body, short legs, oversized paws, a curved upright tail, triangular ears with pale pink inner ear coloring, closed smiling eyes, a tiny pink nose, black whiskers, and a simple cartoon mouth. Give the cat a bright red collar with a round yellow name tag that reads SHIRO in hand-drawn black letters. Use intentionally imperfect black outlines, uneven proportions, and a naive hand-drawn look as if made quickly in a paint app. Behind the cat, add a large circular tornado of messy scribbles made of many overlapping strokes in bright green and lime green, with scattered white oval gaps and exactly 6 short curved red accent strokes embedded around the swirl. The overall feeling is cute, goofy, chaotic, and playful, like a viral clumsy redraw trend, with flat color fills, no shading, and rough freehand brush lines.
